basic_details.short_information: Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) Apprentice Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 for the trades of Lineman, Turner, Machinist, Carpenter, and Welder.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BBMB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BBMB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BBMB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is 21 July 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues or rejections.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice post at BBMB?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Apprentice post at the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) as per the latest recruitment notification released.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website of BBMB to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026. This makes the application process more accessible to a wider range of candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the starting date for the online application process?
faq.answer: The online application process for the BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 starts on 22 June 2026. Ensure you mark this date to begin your application promptly.

faq.question: Q6. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual Apprentice posts at the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB). The job type is contractual, meaning the employment is for a fixed term as per the apprenticeship rules.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location for these apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these apprentice posts is Talwara, Punjab. Candidates selected will be posted in this region under the Bhakra Beas Management Board.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different trade apprenticeships available?
faq.answer: The available trade apprenticeships include Lineman (2 posts), Turner (1 post), Machinist (1 post), Carpenter (1 post), and Welder (1 post), totaling 6 vacancies.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of BBMB?
faq.answer: The official website of the Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) is bbmb.gov.in. You can visit this website for more information and to access the application portal.
